requirement_topic.en: ENEO Grid Connection — 230/400 V / 50 Hz and Installation Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: ENEO并网接入——230/400 V / 50 Hz及安装协调
requirement_topic.zht: ENEO併網接入——230/400 V / 50 Hz及安裝協調

summary.en: Cameroon's electricity distribution network operates at 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz, supplied by ENEO (Energie du Cameroun), the private concession holder for distribution and supply under the supervision of ARSEL (Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité). EV charging installations that draw significant load from the grid must be coordinated with ENEO for connection capacity, metering, and supply agreement. ARSEL is the sector regulator and must authorise new electricity installations including commercial charging stations. The Cameroon electricity sector is governed by Law No. 2011/022 of 14 December 2011 on the organisation of the electricity sector. Grid reliability and electrification rates vary significantly across Cameroon, particularly outside major urban centres (Douala, Yaoundé), which constrains EV charging deployment in rural or peri-urban locations. Harmonic injection and power-quality requirements follow IEC 61000 series standards.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆配电网采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，由ENEO（喀麦隆能源公司）供电，该公司为在ARSEL（电力部门监管机构）监管下持有配电和供电特许权的私营企业。从电网大功率取电的充电桩安装须与ENEO协调接入容量、计量和供电协议。ARSEL是行业监管机构，须授权包括商业充电站在内的新增电力装置。喀麦隆电力部门受2011年12月14日颁布的第2011/022号关于电力部门组织的法律管辖。喀麦隆各地电网可靠性和电气化率差异显著，在主要城市（杜阿拉、雅温得）以外尤为明显，制约了电动汽车充电设施在农村或城郊的部署。谐波注入和电能质量要求遵循IEC 61000系列标准。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆配電網採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，由ENEO（喀麥隆能源公司）供電，該公司為在ARSEL（電力部門監管機構）監管下持有配電和供電特許權的私營企業。從電網大功率取電的充電樁安裝須與ENEO協調接入容量、計量和供電協議。ARSEL是行業監管機構，須授權包括商業充電站在內的新增電力裝置。喀麥隆電力部門受2011年12月14日頒布的第2011/022號關於電力部門組織的法律管轄。喀麥隆各地電網可靠性和電氣化率差異顯著，在主要城市（杜阿拉、雅溫得）以外尤為明顯，制約了電動汽車充電設施在農村或城郊的部署。諧波注入和電能質量要求遵循IEC 61000系列標準。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 2011/022 of 14 December 2011 — Organisation of the electricity sector in Cameroon
ARSEL — Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité (arsel-cm.org)
ENEO — Energie du Cameroun grid connection and metering requirements (eneocameroon.com)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Cameroon's 230/400 V supply is close but not identical to the China baseline; charger input-voltage range and thermal derating for Cameroon's tropical ambient temperatures (often exceeding 35 °C year-round) must be confirmed. China domestic grid-operator acceptance does not constitute ENEO or ARSEL approval.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。喀麦隆230/400 V供电与中国基线接近但不完全相同；须确认充电桩输入电压范围及针对喀麦隆热带环境温度（全年常超35°C）的热降额。中国国内电网运营商验收不构成ENEO或ARSEL批准。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。喀麥隆230/400 V供電與中國基線接近但不完全相同；須確認充電樁輸入電壓範圍及針對喀麥隆熱帶環境溫度（全年常超35°C）的熱降額。中國國內電網運營商驗收不構成ENEO或ARSEL批准。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger input-voltage range covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) power electronics and thermal design are rated for Cameroon's tropical ambient (sustained 35–40 °C+, with humidity); (3) ENEO supply capacity and connection agreement are secured before installation; (4) ARSEL authorisation for the charging-station installation is obtained; (5) harmonic distortion and power-quality data are prepared for the connection agreement; (6) bilingual French/English installation documentation is provided. Grid reliability constraints in many areas of Cameroon mean that charger protection against voltage fluctuations, outages, and surges must be robust. China domestic 220/380 V design without voltage-range confirmation and tropical derating is not grid-ready for Cameroon.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压范围覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 电力电子和热设计适配喀麦隆热带环境（持续35至40°C以上，兼有高湿度）；(3) 在安装前确保ENEO供电容量和接入协议；(4) 取得ARSEL对充电站安装的授权；(5) 准备谐波畸变和电能质量数据用于接入协议；(6) 提供法语/英语双语安装文件。喀麦隆许多地区的电网可靠性制约意味着充电桩须具备针对电压波动、停电和浪涌的强健保护。未确认电压范围和热带降额的中国国内220/380 V设计不满足喀麦隆并网要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓範圍覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 電力電子和熱設計適配喀麥隆熱帶環境（持續35至40°C以上，兼有高濕度）；(3) 在安裝前確保ENEO供電容量和接入協議；(4) 取得ARSEL對充電站安裝的授權；(5) 準備諧波畸變和電能質量數據用於接入協議；(6) 提供法語/英語雙語安裝文件。喀麥隆許多地區的電網可靠性制約意味著充電樁須具備針對電壓波動、停電和浪涌的強健保護。未確認電壓範圍和熱帶降額的中國國內220/380 V設計不滿足喀麥隆併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARSEL authorisation is required for new commercial electricity installations including EV charging stations; ENEO supply agreement and connection coordination are required for grid-connected chargers; Law No. 2011/022 governs the sector
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an ENEO or ARSEL approval substitute; voltage, humidity, and thermal ratings must be re-confirmed for Cameroon conditions

source.publisher: ARSEL — Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité du Cameroun

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Cameroon-ready charger needs grid-voltage and tropical thermal derating confirmation, ARSEL authorisation for the installation, ENEO connection agreement, and bilingual French/English documentation. China domestic 220/380 V design without voltage-range and tropical derating confirmation is not Cameroon grid-ready. Grid reliability constraints must be assessed site-by-site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向喀麦隆的充电桩须完成电网电压和热带热降额确认、取得ARSEL安装授权、与ENEO签订接入协议，并提供法语/英语双语文件。未确认电压范围和热带降额的中国国内220/380 V设计不满足喀麦隆并网要求。须逐站点评估电网可靠性制约。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向喀麥隆的充電樁須完成電網電壓和熱帶熱降額確認、取得ARSEL安裝授權、與ENEO簽訂接入協議，並提供法語/英語雙語文件。未確認電壓範圍和熱帶降額的中國國內220/380 V設計不滿足喀麥隆併網要求。須逐站點評估電網可靠性制約。
